text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having successfully coaxed her into running
sprints, I fear it might be hard to convince her like
this again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I worry, my fears are assuaged when
Sakura Bakushin O speaks favorably about her
trust in me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listening to her thoughts, I too gain new
determination. I vow to lead her down a Bakushin
Road where she can truly shine.
